task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the custom payment term with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a payment term configuration screen or list showing the name '3-Installment (30/40/30)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment term is configured with the correct 3-installment schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the payment term rules/lines. It should show three lines: 30% due immediately (0 days), 40% due in 30 days, and 30% (or 'Balance') due in 60 days.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice is created for the correct customer with the correct products and total.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an invoice form where the Customer is 'Pinnacle Industries'. The invoice lines must show 10 'Industrial Control Panel' units at $750.00 each and 10 'Sensor Array Module' units at $500.00 each. The total amount should be $12,500.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the newly created payment term is applied to the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Payment Terms' field on the invoice form. It must be set to '3-Installment (30/40/30)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the invoice has been posted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the invoice status indicator. It should show 'Posted' (often indicated by a status bar or a 'Posted' ribbon), rather than 'Draft'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts interacting with the backend.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the Odoo forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating menus, filling out form fields, and clicking save/confirm buttons, rather than just displaying a text file with the expected answers.

integrity.description: Verify the UI was not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer console/elements panel should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to fake the invoice or payment term names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a payment term named '3-Installment (30/40/30)' in Odoo. The schedule must be exactly: 30% due immediately (0 days), 40% due in 30 days, and 30% (or balance) due in 60 days. The invoice must be for 'Pinnacle Industries' and include 10 'Industrial Control Panel' units ($750 each) and 10 'Sensor Array Module' units ($500 each), totaling exactly $12,500.00. The invoice must have the new payment term applied and be in a 'Posted' state.
